title: Chaos Saga Blades
description: These are the blades from the famous German Minecraft Series the Chaos Saga by Chaosflo44
body: This Mod is showing off the Chaos Blades from the Chaos Saga by Chaosflo44. Those are 6 Blades which are Very powerful, this mod likely isnt for survival purposes but it can grant some people memories to their childhood. You can use the blades to do fun stuff like one shotting the enderdragon or just using it for remaking old moments from the chaos saga. The mod has 6 swords, Generation which does 444 Damage, Arrival, genesis and Revolution which do 44, modblade which does 14 and lasty utopia which does 54 Damage
